headline: Why DoorDash (DASH) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of on-demand food delivery service DoorDash (NASDAQ:DASH) jumped 3.9% in the afternoon session after the company announced an expansion of its partnership with Lyft into Canada and a significant grocery expansion in the country.

headline: Jobs Report, Palantir, Pinterest, AMD, PayPal, Disney, and More to Watch This Week
summary: ON Semiconductor, Pfizer, Uber, McDonald’s, and many more will report earnings this week. Economic releases will include the April jobs report and purchasing managers index.

headline: Wall Street Week Ahead
summary: Busy week ahead: April jobs report, Fed loan survey, and key earnings (AMD, Disney, Uber, Palantir).
